element.ToolTip: Maximum size of the send buffer used by each TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpWmemMax

element.ToolTip: Minimum size of the send buffer used by each TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpWmemMin

element.ToolTip: The default size of the send buffer for a TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpWmemDefault

element.ToolTip: Maximum TCP send window when using SO_SNDBUF
element.Name: ctlWmemMax

element.ToolTip: Maximum TCP receive window when using SO_RCVBUF
element.Name: ctlRmemMax

element.ToolTip: Enable RFC1323 TCP window scaling
element.Name: CheckEdit3

element.ToolTip: Enable RFC1323 TCP timestamps
element.Name: CheckEdit2

element.ToolTip: Enable RFC2884 Explicit Congestion Notification
element.Name: CheckEdit1

element.ToolTip: Maximum number of times a TCP packet is retransmitted in established state before giving up
element.Name: ctlTcpRetries2

element.ToolTip: Time in seconds to keep an IP fragment in memory
element.Name: ctlTcpIpfragTime

element.ToolTip: Number of times TCP will attempt to retransmit a packet on an established connection normally
element.Name: ctlTcpRetries1

element.ToolTip: Maximum number of times a SYN/ACK segment for a passive TCP connection will be retransmitted
element.Name: ctlTcpSynackRetries

element.ToolTip: Maximum number of times initial SYNs for an active TCP connection attempt will be retransmitted
element.Name: ctlTcpSynRetries

element.ToolTip: Seconds to wait for a final FIN packet before the socket is forcibly closed
element.Name: ctlTcpFinTimeout

element.ToolTip: First local port allowed for TCP and UDP to use for client connection
element.Name: ctlTcpPortMin

element.ToolTip: Last local port allowed for TCP and UDP to use for client connection
element.Name: ctlTcpPortMax

element.ToolTip: Connection idle seconds before TCP begins sending out keep-alive probes
element.Name: ctlTcpKeepaliveTime

element.ToolTip: Maximum number of TCP keep-alive probes to send before giving up
element.Name: ctlTcpKeepaliveProbes

element.ToolTip: Seconds between TCP keep-alive probes
element.Name: ctlTcpKeepaliveIntvl

element.ToolTip: Maximum size of the receive buffer used by each TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpRmemMax

element.ToolTip: Minimum size of the receive buffer used by each TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpRmemMin

element.ToolTip: Default size of the receive buffer for a TCP socket
element.Name: ctlTcpRmemDefault

element.ToControlCSSource: tcp_rmem_default
tcp_wmem_default
tcp_keepalive_time
tcp_keepalive_intvl
tcp_keepalive_probes
tcp_port_min
tcp_port_max
tcp_fin_timeout
tcp_syn_retries
tcp_synack_retries
tcp_retries1
tcp_retries2
tcp_ipfrag_time
tcp_ecn
tcp_timestamps
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_rmem_default") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_rmem_default") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_rmem_default") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;

SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_keepalive_probes") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;

SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_port_min") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;

SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_fin_timeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_fin_timeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_syn_retries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_syn_retries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_synack_retries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;

SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_retries2") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;

SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_ipfrag_time") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("TCPPlugin.tcp_ipfrag_time") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
